Editors

Video editor portfolio guide

A portfolio should make fit obvious. The strongest editor profiles show the exact kind of editing a hiring team needs next.

Organize by work type

Separate YouTube, short-form social, podcast, brand, paid social, event, and assistant editor examples. Hiring teams scan for relevance before they judge taste.

Add context beside clips

For each sample, note the brief, your role, turnaround time, tools used, and whether you handled sound, graphics, captions, color, or revisions.

Lead with the job's format

When applying to a role, send two or three examples that match the content format. A broad reel can support your case, but matched examples should come first.

Want better editing work?

Join the editor list and tell us what work fits you.
